title: Join Play Time
description: When a player joins, they receive a 'Welcome Back' title along with their total time played on the server.
body:
# Join Play Time
This simple but effective datapack introduces a feature for welcoming back your players.

## Feature
Upon a player joining the server, they will be greeted with a 'Welcome Back' title.

The subtitle displays the player's total time played on the server, formatted into days, hours, and minutes.
